error_signature: form not submitted due to invisible HTML characters
title: Form submission blocked by invisible HTML characters in Rich Text
symptom: The form does not submit even when the Rich Text field appears filled. The validation fails due to invisible HTML characters.
applies_when: Using Rich Text element for form input
not_this_if: Using standard input fields without custom validation
root_cause: Rich Text fields often contain invisible HTML characters that can lead to incorrect validation results. When checking for non-empty values, these characters can cause the validation to return true even if the user perceives the field as empty.
fix_steps: Implement a JavaScript function to clean the Rich Text input by removing HTML tags and decoding HTML entities.
Check the length of the cleaned text to determine if the field is truly filled.
Provide visual feedback to the user if the form cannot be submitted.
agent_instruction: Use the provided JavaScript code to validate the Rich Text input before form submission.
